vitals.terrain: Mixed road terrain with long climbs and technical descents

course_description.overview: A premier gran fondo/road cycling event held in team format covering 202km through the scenic Western Cape wine country. The course navigates the roads around Cape Town and Swellendam, featuring long climbs, technical descents, and fast-paced stretches that test rider endurance, strategy, and team coordination.

key_segments.name: Full Course
key_segments.description: Team-based endurance challenge through Western Cape wine country with long climbs, technical descents, and fast-paced sections

course_description.difficulty_narrative: The event is designed as a challenging endurance test requiring stamina, strategy, and strong team coordination. Riders face long climbs and technical descents across scenic yet demanding roads, making it suitable for cyclists of various levels seeking to test their capabilities.

logistics.getting_there: Located in Swellendam, Western Cape, South Africa. Bicycle logistics services available for team transportation to the start line.
logistics.accommodation: Unknown; Western Cape region offers various lodging options in nearby towns and wine country areas
logistics.registration_details: Registration available through doublecentury.co.za. Contact: +27 87 820 7223 / +27 87 820 4300 or info@doublecentury.co.za. Team-based format required.
logistics.bike_logistics: Specialized bicycle transportation services available for teams; booking recommended due to limited spaces
logistics.local_considerations: Event held in Western Cape wine country; participants can experience South Africa's diverse landscapes and local culture

final_verdict.one_liner: South Africa's premier endurance road cycling challenge combining scenic wine country beauty with demanding 202km team-based racing since 1993.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Experienced cyclists seeking an endurance challenge, team-oriented riders, those interested in South African cycling culture, and participants wanting to experience Western Cape landscapes while testing their limits
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for serious endurance cyclists and team-focused riders. The event's prestige, scenic location, and challenging course make it a worthwhile destination event, though costs and team coordination requirements should be considered.
pro_tips: Book bicycle logistics services early as spaces are limited
Prepare for long climbs and technical descents; train accordingly
Coordinate team strategy in advance; teamwork is important for success
Plan accommodation in Western Cape wine country early; explore the region beyond race day
